concerns.text: Task T015 enforces a hard abort (E-DATA-001) if adhesion energy is missing. This violates the spec's Edge Case E-DATA-001 which explicitly mandates a proxy fallback path (using binding energy from bace/esol) if a justification document is generated. The task silently removes a required spec behavior.

Task T020 implements a 3-layer GAT (Graph Attention Network). The spec FR-003 and US-2 explicitly mandate a 'Graph Convolutional Network (GCN)'. While the plan notes this contradiction, the task list must not silently relax the spec's architectural requirement without a corresponding spec amendment or explicit 'staged' flag in the task description.

Task T031 implements a permutation test with 100 iterations. The spec FR-005 and US-3 Independent Test explicitly mandate 1000 iterations. Reducing this to 100 without a 'staged' or 'deferred' marker in the task description constitutes a silent weakening of the statistical validation requirement.

Task T014 enforces a ≥100 row threshold. The spec US-1 Acceptance Scenario 1 requires the system to log a 'Limited Power' warning and report the margin of error if the dataset is <500 rows. The task description omits this mandatory reporting behavior, effectively dropping an acceptance criterion.
